image.title: NAJ Zhao, S Tian, D Lu, J Yang, H Zeng, F Zhang, D Tu, G Ge, Y Zheng, T Shi, X Xu, S Zhao, Y Yang, W Zhang

item.title: Systems pharmacological study illustrates the immune regulation, anti-infection, anti-inflammation, and multi-organ protection mechanism of Qing-Fei-Pai-Du decoction in the treatment of COVID-19.
